variants.name: Rees
meanings: German: habitational name from a place in the Rhineland called Rees.
German: from a short form of the personal name   Andreas  .

nameMeanings.name: Hywel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: originally a byname from a vocabulary word meaning ‘eminent, conspicuous’; it was common in the Middle Ages and was revived in the 20th-century.

variants.name: Hywell
meanings: Traditional: originally a byname from a vocabulary word meaning ‘eminent, conspicuous’; it was common in the Middle Ages and was revived in the 20th-century.

variants.name: Howell
meanings: Anglicized form of the Welsh name Hywel , or a transferred use of the surname derived from that name.

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: Hywel ap Rhys Lord of Llnddrg was born about 1196, in Is Cennen, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom. He had at least 1 daughter with Mrs. Hywel ap Rhys Lord of Linddrg. He died after 1227.

ja.lifeSummary: Hywel ap Rhys Lord of Llnddrgは約1196年にイギリスウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアイス センで生まれた。彼はMrs. Hywel ap Rhys Lord of Linddrgとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1227年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hywel ap Rhys Lord of Llnddrg(은)는 대략 1196년 영국 웨일스 카마테실르 이스 세넨에서 태어났다. 그는 Mrs. Hywel ap Rhys Lord of Linddrg(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1227년 이후 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Hywel ap Rhys Lord of Llnddrg родился около 1196 г. в местности ис кеннен, кармартеншир, Уэльс, Великобритания. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Mrs. Hywel ap Rhys Lord of Linddrg. Он умер после 1227 г.
